The range

The HPO.TECH range.

Premium hard-shell hyperbaric chambers, built to deliver the dose the published research uses. From one person to a full team, home to clinic - the same engineering throughout.

Get a quote Read the buying guide

HPO.TECH build the chambers. We're their official worldwide specialist - you pay the same price as going direct, and we handle specification, install, training and everything with the manufacturer.

From around £60,000€70,000 · $75,000 · varies by model
From around $75,000£60,000 · €70,000 · varies by model
From around €70,000£60,000 · $75,000 · varies by model
Why choose an HPO.TECH chamber

The range

Built for one, two or four.

The three core chambers in the range run the same 2.0-2.4 ATA dose through the same built-in breathing system. What changes is how many people it holds, and the room it's built for.

For home & personal use
Click to enlarge
3/4 viewFrontRearInterior
Zeugma1 person · Up to 2.0-2.4 ATA

Single-seat chamber for daily personal use or luxury facilities. The one Bryan Johnson runs.

Request the spec
Click to enlarge
3/4 viewFrontInteriorIn situ
Atlantis2 people · Up to 2.0-2.4 ATA

Shared sessions for couples, families or a small facility.

Request the spec
Typically for clinics & professional settings

Front3/4 viewInteriorClinic install
Mediterranean4 people · Up to 2.0-2.4 ATA

Group sessions for teams and high-throughput clinics.

ApexAltitude
Apex
Altitude · to 8,000m
Hypobaric altitude training, not HBOT. For athletes and mountaineers.
Enquire

The same chamber, finished for a home, a commercial setting or a facility.

What every chamber includes

The engineering is the same, whichever you choose.

Features shared across the range.

BIBS mask
The dose
Up to 2.0-2.4 ATA through a built-in breathing system, not a hospital mask - the oxygen dose the studies used.
Emergency release
Safety engineered in
A 90-second mechanical emergency release that needs no power, plus automated oxygen monitoring.
Cert plate
Independently certified
Built and inspected to international pressure-vessel and medical-device standards.
Control screen
Control, in and out
Touchscreen and manual control mirrored inside and out, with intercom throughout.
Interior
Built for the full session
Reclining seats, climate control and entertainment - comfortable across a 60 to 90 minute session.
Window
Excellent visibility
Large acrylic doors and windows - open, not confined.
Entertainment
Entertainment built in
A built-in screen with streaming and sound, so a full session passes easily.
Lighting
Adaptable lighting
Adjustable interior lighting - tuned for focus, calm or a branded look.
Monitoring
Vitals monitoring
Optional monitoring of user vitals and session data throughout.

Make it yours

Matched to a home, a brand or a club.

Interior leather, exterior colours (any RAL or automotive finish), logo embroidery and branding - specified to you.

Leather paletteRAL / exteriorClub interiorLogo embroidery
Ask about finishes

Standards

Engineered and certified properly.

CEISO 13485PEDPVHOASMENFPAMDD → MDR

Models are CE certified and conform to the relevant safety standards. For medical use, HPO.TECH holds MDD and is in transition to MDR - ask us for details.

See all HPO.TECH certifications

Cleared for medical use across the Gulf

Every HPO.TECH system holds full marketing authorisation from the Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) and is registered with the UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP).

See our certifications

Not sure which model?

Tell us your space and how you'll use it. We'll recommend the right chamber and what it costs.
